title: No Smoking
description: Smoking is strictly prohibited inside the apartment and on balconies. $500 cleaning fee applies if violated.

title: No Pets
description: Pets are not permitted as per body corporate by-laws

title: Quiet Hours
description: Please respect neighbours - quiet time 10 PM - 7 AM on weekdays, 11 PM - 8 AM weekends

title: Guest Limit
description: Maximum occupancy as per booking. No unregistered guests permitted.

title: No Parties
description: Parties and events strictly prohibited. Body corporate security will remove violators.

title: Recycling
description: Yellow bin for recycling, red bin for general waste. Bins located in kitchen.

title: Pool & Facilities
description: Pool hours 6am-10pm. Children must be supervised. No glass in pool area.

title: Parking
description: One car space only. No parking in visitor bays. Strictly enforced by body corporate.
